prompt: Create a gritty cinematic photorealistic full-body action portrait of a desperate young adult man with short dark hair sprinting directly toward the camera down a narrow suburban street. He is captured mid-stride, breathing hard and intensely focused, with his face anonymized by a soft rectangular blur. He wears a sweat-soaked and mud-stained gray athletic T-shirt, dark running shorts, black shoes, and a small worn olive backpack with visible shoulder straps bouncing on his back. His arms and legs are dirty with mud, emphasizing exhaustion and urgency. Behind him are exactly 3 blurred pursuing figures: one long-haired figure at the far left partly obscured near parked cars, one muddy runner directly behind-left, and one muddy runner behind-right in a torn dark shirt. Set the scene on an overgrown residential road lined with brick houses, parked cars, weeds, cracked asphalt, hedges, utility poles, and overhead power lines. The sky is dark and stormy with heavy gray clouds, creating a survival-thriller atmosphere. Use a vertical 9:16 composition, medium-long full-body framing, low eye-level camera, shallow depth of field, motion energy, realistic natural lighting, wet muddy textures, muted desaturated colors, high detail, dramatic contrast, and documentary-style realism. Include a partial blurred car side mirror or dashboard edge in the lower right foreground and an old silver car with ivy growing around it on the left. No text, no watermark, no gore.
